rationale: Option B's time-range join silently misattributes tokens under ll-parallel/ll-sprint concurrency (no session_id on loop_runs to scope it), directly undermining the issue's waste-ranking goal; a wrong ranking is worse than no ranking.
rule: Option A — schema run_id join key on usage_events, live per-invocation writer
alternatives_rejected: Option B — time-range join (usage_events.ts BETWEEN loop_runs.started_at/ended_at), zero-migration but silently incorrect under concurrent loop runs
